questions.question: What Hawaiian island was flattened by Hurricane Iniki?

What was closed to traffic after the Six Day War in 1967, and not reopened until 1975?
What extinct birds were once so prolific that 18th-century American farmers fed them to pigs?
How many playing points grace a backgammon board?
